prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Renji Dawnblade in a crimson guild cloak and leather armor stands at a rustic wooden table, unrolling a detailed parchment quest map. Mika Starling, an androgynous healer in cream and mint robes, stands beside him, looking down at the map with a calm expression. Cinematic lighting, vibrant anime aesthetic, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Mika Starling leans forward to trace a path on the quest map with a finger, looking up to nod at Renji Dawnblade. Renji smiles confidently, resting his hand on his broadsword hilt as they finalize the mission plan together. Consistent identities, camera, and lighting, no text, no watermark.
